refund_policy.notes: Has Refund Policy page mentioned. Referenced in Privacy Policy, Terms of Service page.

terms_of_service.summary: Users must be at least 18 years old. Prohibited uses include: sending spam or unsolicited content, hosting or distributing malware, illegal activities.
key_points: Eligibility: Must be at least 18 years old and capable of forming binding contract
Acceptable Use: No spam, no malware, no illegal activities

acceptable_use_policy.notes: Terms of Service includes acceptable use prohibitions.
